title: Community Health - Neighborhood Center
scene_prompt: World Shot: Cinematic documentary photograph of a vibrant Latin American community health center in a sunlit urban neighborhood. A modern single-story building with open windows and a covered outdoor waiting area sits at the center of a lively residential block. Young families walk along a tree-lined sidewalk, children visible in school uniforms in the background — no identifiable faces. A nurse or social worker (seen from behind, no face) stands at the entrance welcoming visitors. Potted plants and painted murals on the building facade. Morning light floods the scene from the left, casting long warm shadows across the sidewalk. The upper 40% of the frame is bright blue sky with scattered clouds, providing clean space. The lower 60% is the street-level community scene with the health center as focal anchor. Composition divides horizontally: sky and treeline above, community life below, with the health center entrance as the clear focal point at a grid intersection. Shot on 35mm lens, f/3.5 aperture. Kodak Portra 800 film stock. Warm analog color palette — forest green (#0f4c3a) shadows under trees and awnings, Safety Amber (#F4A261) from morning sunlight on building surfaces. Fine organic film grain. Natural vignetting. Editorial documentary quality. The image feels like a thriving community being well-served — the viewer sees the outcome of intelligence: healthier neighborhoods, connected services, children safe and visible. Optimistic, warm, alive with purpose. No typography, no logos, no words, no lettering of any kind, no identifiable human faces.
palette: Forest Green #0f4c3a shadows · Safety Amber #F4A261 morning light · Cyber Emerald #00D1B2 accent on health signage
composition: Horizontal 2x grid: bright sky upper 40% / community street scene lower 60%. Health center entrance as focal anchor right of center.
